The party enters a magnificent marble audience chamber to meet the Chieftain. The narrator struggles with the scale of the room and the furniture, which feels mismatched to the current Martian occupants.
The party enters the threshold of the grand hall.
The narrator stands intimidated before the seated chieftain.
Navigating a massive, mismatched environment to face the ruling authority.
